rule: progress requires machine-carried improvement in at least two key surfaces relative to the post-sync pre-contour state

surfaces.post: clear on rollout rotation claim surface
apply returned would_change=false and zero remaining delta

surfaces.surface: runtime mode/source truth for the active lane
surfaces.pre: desired source remained on observed inventory family
surfaces.post: desired source moved back to approved target but effective source remains observed

note: claim_gate remained blocked, so the contour closes at runtime reproof rather than auth admission
